_doc: Plain-language equivalents per locale for finance terms that must NEVER appear as jargon. The translation pipeline injects this into every prompt so 172 picks x 3 langs stay consistent. Value = how a non-finance reader would say it, NOT the dictionary term.

rendimiento por dividendo.pt: dividendo (o dinheiro que pagam a você)

márgenes.en: how much they keep per sale
márgenes.hi: har sale se kitna bachta hai

deuda neta / EBITDA.en: how big their debt is vs. earnings
deuda neta / EBITDA.pt: tamanho da dívida vs. o que ganham
deuda neta / EBITDA.hi: kamai ke muqable kitna karz hai
